subcodes.first_line: O Lutfu'llah! God willing, mayest thou be occupied, throughout the nights and days, with the remembrance of God, exalted be His glory, in such wise that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا لطف الله انشاء الله در لیالی و ایام بذکر حق جل جلاله مشغول باشی بشانیکه
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
